compounddef.compoundname: NDIdentityInterpolationBuilder< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, DataType, IdxRangeInterpolation, IdxRange< Basis... > >

memberdef.definition: using NDIdentityInterpolationBuilder< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, DataType, IdxRangeInterpolation, IdxRange< Basis... > >::exec_space = ExecSpace
memberdef.name: exec_space
memberdef.qualifiedname: NDIdentityInterpolationBuilder< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, DataType, IdxRangeInterpolation, IdxRange< Basis... > >::exec_space

briefdescription.para: The type of the Kokkos execution space.

memberdef.definition: using NDIdentityInterpolationBuilder< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, DataType, IdxRangeInterpolation, IdxRange< Basis... > >::memory_space = MemorySpace
memberdef.name: memory_space
memberdef.qualifiedname: NDIdentityInterpolationBuilder< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, DataType, IdxRangeInterpolation, IdxRange< Basis... > >::memory_space

briefdescription.para: The type of the Kokkos memory space.

memberdef.definition: using NDIdentityInterpolationBuilder< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, DataType, IdxRangeInterpolation, IdxRange< Basis... > >::data_type = DataType
memberdef.name: data_type
memberdef.qualifiedname: NDIdentityInterpolationBuilder< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, DataType, IdxRangeInterpolation, IdxRange< Basis... > >::data_type

briefdescription.para: The data type that the data is saved on.

memberdef.definition: using NDIdentityInterpolationBuilder< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, DataType, IdxRangeInterpolation, IdxRange< Basis... > >::interpolation_idx_range_type = IdxRangeInterpolation
memberdef.name: interpolation_idx_range_type
memberdef.qualifiedname: NDIdentityInterpolationBuilder< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, DataType, IdxRangeInterpolation, IdxRange< Basis... > >::interpolation_idx_range_type

briefdescription.para: The ND index range for the interpolation mesh.

memberdef.type: IdxRange< typename Basis::template Impl< Basis, MemorySpace >::knot_grid... >
memberdef.definition: using NDIdentityInterpolationBuilder< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, DataType, IdxRangeInterpolation, IdxRange< Basis... > >::coeff_idx_range_type = IdxRange<typename Basis::template Impl<Basis, MemorySpace>::knot_grid...>
memberdef.name: coeff_idx_range_type
memberdef.qualifiedname: NDIdentityInterpolationBuilder< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, DataType, IdxRangeInterpolation, IdxRange< Basis... > >::coeff_idx_range_type

briefdescription.para: The type of the index range for the bases over which coefficients of an ND Lagrange interpolation are defined.

memberdef.type: ddc::detail::convert_type_seq_to_discrete_domain_t< ddc::type_seq_replace_t< ddc::to_type_seq_t< BatchedInterpolationIdxRange >, ddc::to_type_seq_t< IdxRangeInterpolation >, ddc::detail::TypeSeq< typename Basis::template Impl< Basis, MemorySpace >::knot_grid... > > >
memberdef.definition: using NDIdentityInterpolationBuilder< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, DataType, IdxRangeInterpolation, IdxRange< Basis... > >::batched_basis_idx_range_type = ddc::detail::convert_type_seq_to_discrete_domain_t<ddc::type_seq_replace_t< ddc::to_type_seq_t<BatchedInterpolationIdxRange>, ddc::to_type_seq_t<IdxRangeInterpolation>, ddc::detail::TypeSeq< typename Basis::template Impl<Basis, MemorySpace>::knot_grid...> >>
memberdef.name: batched_basis_idx_range_type
memberdef.qualifiedname: NDIdentityInterpolationBuilder< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, DataType, IdxRangeInterpolation, IdxRange< Basis... > >::batched_basis_idx_range_type

briefdescription.para: Batched domain with each interpolation grid replaced by its basis domain.

detaileddescription.para: Chains ddc::replace_dim_of_t for each (InterpolationGrid_i, BasisDomain_i) pair.

memberdef.definition: using NDIdentityInterpolationBuilder< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, DataType, IdxRangeInterpolation, IdxRange< Basis... > >::batched_derivs_idx_range_type = BatchedInterpolationIdxRange
memberdef.name: batched_derivs_idx_range_type
memberdef.qualifiedname: NDIdentityInterpolationBuilder< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, DataType, IdxRangeInterpolation, IdxRange< Basis... > >::batched_derivs_idx_range_type

briefdescription.para: The type of the index range on which derivatives should be provided (here unused).

memberdef.definition: NDIdentityInterpolationBuilder< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, DataType, IdxRangeInterpolation, IdxRange< Basis... > >::NDIdentityInterpolationBuilder
memberdef.name: NDIdentityInterpolationBuilder
memberdef.qualifiedname: NDIdentityInterpolationBuilder< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, DataType, IdxRangeInterpolation, IdxRange< Basis... > >::NDIdentityInterpolationBuilder

memberdef.definition: void NDIdentityInterpolationBuilder< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, DataType, IdxRangeInterpolation, IdxRange< Basis... > >::operator()
memberdef.argsstring: (Field< DataType, batched_basis_idx_range_type< BatchedInterpolationIdxRange >, memory_space > coeffs, ConstField< DataType, BatchedInterpolationIdxRange, memory_space > vals) const
memberdef.name: operator()
memberdef.qualifiedname: NDIdentityInterpolationBuilder< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, DataType, IdxRangeInterpolation, IdxRange< Basis... > >::operator()

briefdescription.para: Compute the interpolation coefficients for a function.

detaileddescription.para: Copies vals directly to coeffs. No computation is needed because the interpolation coefficients equal the function values at the grid nodes.

simplesect.para: Periodic bases are not yet supported. The copy logic for periodic dimensions (wrapping the last point back to the start) is non-trivial in ND because each combination of periodic/non-periodic dimensions must be handled separately (2^k copies for k periodic dimensions). This will be implemented when needed.

parameterdescription.para: The values of the function on the interpolation mesh.

memberdef.definition: batched_basis_idx_range_type< BatchedInterpolationIdxRange > NDIdentityInterpolationBuilder< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, DataType, IdxRangeInterpolation, IdxRange< Basis... > >::batched_basis_idx_range
memberdef.name: batched_basis_idx_range
memberdef.qualifiedname: NDIdentityInterpolationBuilder< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, DataType, IdxRangeInterpolation, IdxRange< Basis... > >::batched_basis_idx_range

briefdescription.para: Get the batched basis index range for a given batched interpolation domain.

memberdef.definition: void NDIdentityInterpolationBuilder< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, DataType, IdxRangeInterpolation, IdxRange< Basis... > >::copy_periodic_data
memberdef.name: copy_periodic_data
memberdef.qualifiedname: NDIdentityInterpolationBuilder< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, DataType, IdxRangeInterpolation, IdxRange< Basis... > >::copy_periodic_data

memberdef.name: copy_periodic_data_on_dim
memberdef.qualifiedname: NDIdentityInterpolationBuilder< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, DataType, IdxRangeInterpolation, IdxRange< Basis... > >::copy_periodic_data_on_dim

briefdescription.para: The implementation of NDIdentityInterpolationBuilder. This is separate to allow a variadic Basis.
